name: trash-game
description: Trash — a private-by-default, zero-cost, server-authoritative party card game on Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b shared server && npm run typecheck --workspace=client
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:server && npm run deploy:client
scripts.deploy:client: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run pages:deploy --workspace=client
